description_long: This is a stylized ninja-themed doll with a sleek, athletic build, dressed in a black bodysuit accented by armor-like elements and a single oversized sleeve on the left arm. The doll's face is partially covered by a mask, leaving only the eyes visible, and it has a high ponytail of silvery-white hair tied at the back. Two swords are strapped in an X-shape across the back, and the waist is adorned with utility pouches and belts, enhancing the combat-ready appearance. The right arm is armored with a clawed gauntlet, while the left arm is covered by a large, draping sleeve. The legs are long and slender, ending in high-heeled boots, and the overall color palette is dominated by shades of black, gray, and silver. The design is reminiscent of modern ninja or cyberpunk aesthetics, with a focus on agility and stealth.
description: A stylized ninja doll in a black bodysuit with armor, mask, high ponytail, and twin swords on the back, featuring a dramatic sleeve and combat accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, armored right arm, oversized left sleeve, utility belts, and both swords visible on the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the high ponytail, the profile of the mask, and the draping sleeve, with the swords' hilts extending above the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the X-shaped sword arrangement, the full length of the ponytail, and the back details of the outfit and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the armored gauntlet, the fitted bodysuit, and the profile of the boots and accessories.
attribute_clothing_style: Modern ninja-inspired attire with a fitted black bodysuit, armored gauntlet, oversized left sleeve, utility belts, and high-heeled boots, accented by metallic and synthetic details in a cyberpunk aesthetic.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward, right arm bent at the elbow, left arm relaxed with sleeve draping, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with eyes visible and mouth covered by a mask, no visible emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, silvery-white hair styled in a high ponytail tied at the back.
